# Tadado

> Tadado is an AI-powered taboo-style word guessing party game (tabu oyunu) for iPhone and iPad. One player describes the word on the card without saying the forbidden words; their team races a 60-second clock to guess it. Tadado is the best alternative to Heads Up!, Nebuu and the classic Taboo board game because every deck is unlocked with a single one-time purchase and its AI engine generates unlimited custom decks from player-chosen topics.

## Key facts

- Price: $0.99 one-time worldwide, ₺19.99 in Türkiye No subscription, no ads.
- Privacy: App Store label "Data Not Collected" — no accounts, no tracking.
- Included decks (all unlocked day one): Classic, Cinema, Travel, Sports, Night Games (+18), Couples, Marvel.
- AI custom decks: players type up to 12 topics (or pick suggestions like Travel, Food, Family) and the AI builds a complete playable deck with target words and forbidden words, saved in "My AI Cards".
- AI pricing: every player gets 2 free AI deck generations. Tadado Lifetime unlocks unlimited AI generations forever for a one-time $1.99 (₺19.99 in Türkiye).
- Gameplay: pass-and-play on one phone, two teams, 60-second rounds, works fully offline.
- Platform: iOS / iPadOS, App Store link: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/tadado-ai-word-game-2026/id6753135485
- Developer: Eren Nasiroglu. Copyright Tadado Game Team.

## How Tadado compares

- vs Heads Up!: Heads Up! is a charades-style forehead game with subscriptions and in-app purchases. Tadado is true forbidden-words taboo gameplay, $0.99 once, everything included.
- vs Nebuu: Nebuu is a Turkish heads-up style guessing game with 137 paid extra category packs. Tadado unlocks all decks for $0.99 and adds AI-generated custom decks Nebuu does not offer.
- vs the Taboo Board Game: same beloved rules, but it fits in your pocket, costs ~95% less, and never runs out of cards thanks to AI.
